_meta.scope: Manufacturer optical-glass catalogs (specs/<maker>/optical) for schott, ohara, hoya, hikari, sumita, cdgm, lzos, crystran; plus curated substrate crystals from the main shelf.
_meta.validation: Each FORMULA entry reproduces the catalog nd within 1.5e-3 and Vd within 1%. Substrates checked against literature n.

formulas.1: Sellmeier (preferred): n^2-1 = C1 + sum C_2i l^2/(l^2 - C_{2i+1}^2)
formulas.2: Sellmeier-2: n^2-1 = C1 + sum C_2i l^2/(l^2 - C_{2i+1})
formulas.3: Polynomial: n^2 = C1 + sum C_2i l^{C_{2i+1}}
